wiring_concerns.title: MCP Tool Execution Security Gap (30% coverage)
wiring_concerns.detail: MCP tool execution security at 30%, MCP Gateway Zero-Trust at 20%. Arbitrary tool calls can bypass auth.

wiring_concerns.title: API Key Leak in Public heady-docs Repo
wiring_concerns.detail: Leaked prefixes: pplx-FvR1..., sk-ant-api03-..., ghp_49EA... in api/api-keys-reference.md. Cleaned in issue #1 but git history retains. Rotate all three keys.

wiring_concerns.title: Hardcoded Neon DB Credentials in Colab Notebooks
wiring_concerns.detail: Plaintext DATABASE_URL in Jupyter notebooks committed to git. Stripped in commit 706bc292 (2026-03-16) but git history retains. Requires BFG/filter-repo to purge.

wiring_concerns.title: Unresolved Merge Conflicts in README.md
wiring_concerns.detail: <<<<<<< HEAD conflict markers present between HEAD and commit 233933e0. Indicates incomplete merge during active rearchitecture.

wiring_concerns.title: npx -y heady-mcp-server Supply Chain Risk
wiring_concerns.detail: mcp_config.json uses npx -y to auto-install heady-mcp-server at runtime with HEADY_API_TOKEN injected. Malicious npm package compromise = RCE.

wiring_concerns.title: Cross-Domain Auth Contract Incomplete
wiring_concerns.detail: SessionManager in @heady/persistence relays auth across 9 domains via httpOnly cookies. Cross-Site Auth Contract documented as incomplete — session hijacking risk.

wiring_concerns.title: *-core Repos Are Stub Projections, Not Standalone Implementations
wiring_concerns.detail: All 10 *-core repos have 2 commits each and a single index.js entrypoint. Real implementations live in HeadyMe/Heady-Main/src/ and packages/. Downstream consumers will find shells.

wiring_concerns.title: Registry Domain Mismatch (headyio.com vs headysystems.com)
wiring_concerns.detail: heady-registry.json declares domain headyio.com and memory storage at headyio.com/api/memory, but live services are on headysystems.com. Potential routing/discovery failure.

wiring_concerns.title: Node.js → Python Boundary Not Explicitly Documented
wiring_concerns.detail: heady-manager.js (port 3300) calls Python workers (heady_conductor.py, process_data.py). IPC mechanism (child_process vs HTTP) not documented; timeout mismatch and error propagation risks.

wiring_concerns.title: 28K+ AndroidSDK Files in Git History
wiring_concerns.detail: .gitignore gap admitted AndroidSDK/ into repo. Fixed in v4.1.0 but history bloat remains.

wiring_concerns.title: Open WIP Issue in Archived Repo (Will Never Close)
wiring_concerns.detail: Jules admin IDE has incomplete tasks (final tests, code review) in an archived read-only repo. State is permanently unresolved.
